base_url.description: monday.com GraphQL API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://api.monday.com/v2.

api_token.description: monday.com personal API token, sent verbatim (no Bearer prefix) as the Authorization header. Provide either api_token or access_token.

access_token.description: monday.com OAuth access token, sent verbatim (no Bearer prefix) as the Authorization header. Provide either api_token or access_token.

api_version.description: Optional monday.com API-Version header value (e.g. 2024-01). Omitted entirely when unset.
